message:
Merge PR #2195: fix(beads): replace hardcoded state/status string comparisons with typed enums

Introduce AgentState and IssueStatus typed enums in beads package. Replace
scattered string comparisons with typed methods. Re-export in witness for compat.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2195
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
